category_sources: source_facts.description says logcheck mails anomalies in system logfiles to the administrator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides logcheck; source_facts.homepage is the Debian logcheck package page.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Debian package page and the best supplied official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official Debian package metadata identifies the Salsa Git repository for logcheck.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies anomaly detection in system logs and administrator email notifications.
